description: User scrolls down the Explore page to view more session opportunities, moving from 'Short tasks' to 'Sessions'.
frame_description: The screen transitions from showing 'Short tasks' to showing 'Sessions' at the top.

description: User scrolls back up the Explore page, returning to the 'Short tasks' section.
frame_description: The screen transitions from showing 'Sessions' back to 'Short tasks' at the top.
